PLAINTIFF CANNOT AVOID AN ANTI-SLAPP MOTION BY AMENDING THE COMPLAINT PRIOR TO THE HEARING ON THE MOTION. SEE SYLMAR AIR CONDITIONING V. PUEBLO CONTRACTING SERVICES, INC. Notice Of Motion For Special Motion To Strike Complaint (Ccp 425.16)
Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS DAVID WASSERMAN, DANIEL STERN, and WASSERMAN-STERN'S MOTION FOR CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) COMPLAINT OF BRENNAN NEWSOM.

APPEARANCES: David P. Wasserman, Esq. of Wasserman-Stern 567-9600 for defts & moving parties; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF CANNOT AVOID AN ANTI-SLAPP MOTION BY AMENDING THE COMPLAINT PRIOR TO THE HEARING ON THE MOTION. SEE SYLMAR AIR CONDITIONING V. PUEBLO CONTRACTING SERVICES, INC. (2004) 122 CAL.APP.4TH 1049, 1055. Order signed in open court.
